social-sharing.label: Social Sharing
social-sharing.description: Share/print/email buttons for a page. No slots — fully attribute-driven. Can be inline (default) or fixed to the viewport.

attrs.name: data-fixed
attrs.description: `true` = fixed position with hide/show on scroll. Omit/false = inline within content flow (default).

attrs.name: data-title
attrs.description: Custom share title. Defaults to document.title.

attrs.name: data-url
attrs.description: Custom URL to share. Defaults to window.location.

variants.inline: Horizontal button group within content flow.
variants.fixed: Fixed to viewport; auto-hides near page bottom.

social-sharing.notes: Buttons only render when their respective attribute is set to 'true'. Opens native share dialogs via window.open for social platforms.
